message:
🐛 Move GitHub PAT to backend-only storage via API proxy (#2460)

Add GET /api/github/* proxy that forwards read-only GitHub API requests
through the backend, injecting the PAT from server-side encrypted
storage. The frontend no longer stores or sends the GitHub PAT.

Backend changes:
- New github_proxy.go handler with path validation, allowlist, and
  token resolution (user settings → env var fallback)
- POST/DELETE /api/github/token for managing PATs via encrypted settings
- GET /api/github/token/status for checking token availability

Frontend changes (4 files):
- GitHubActivity.tsx: 7 fetch URLs → /api/github/*, removed auth header
- GitHubCIMonitor.tsx: fetch URL → /api/github/*, removed token gate
- useVersionCheck.tsx: 3 fetch URLs → /api/github/*, removed token reads
- GitHubTokenSection.tsx: saves token to backend, validates via proxy

Security: H3 — previously the GitHub PAT was stored base64-encoded in
localStorage, exposing it to XSS. Now stored only in AES-256-GCM
encrypted settings on the backend.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -497,6 +497,13 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Get("/me", user.GetCurrentUser)
 	api.Put("/me", user.UpdateCurrentUser)
 
+	// GitHub API proxy — keeps PAT server-side, frontend calls /api/github/*
+	githubProxy := handlers.NewGitHubProxyHandler(s.config.GitHubToken)
+	api.Get("/github/token/status", githubProxy.HasToken)
+	api.Post("/github/token", githubProxy.SaveToken)
+	api.Delete("/github/token", githubProxy.DeleteToken)
+	api.Get("/github/*", githubProxy.Proxy)
+
 	// Persistent settings routes
 	settingsHandler := handlers.NewSettingsHandler(settings.GetSettingsManager())
 	api.Get("/settings", settingsHandler.GetSettings)
